name: Ttbio Corp.
summary: Ttbio Corp. manufactures and sells medical instruments under the TTBIO brand name in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers high and low speed hand piece products, dental spare parts, service rotors, maintenance units, and electric hand piece systems. It also provides precision machined parts and components to various industries, including medical, automotive, aerospace, computer components, security, maintenance parts, and custom machining. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.
